subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who cannot be known through utterance nor described through proof, Who hath sanctified Himself above all evidence and testimony [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لمن لا یعرف بالبیان و لا یوصف بالبرهان قد تنزه عن کل دلیل و حجه و تقدس
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @praise and encouragement, @Word of God the cause of creation
